description: A customer, 'Alfreds Futterkiste', has gone into liquidation and their outstanding invoice 'INV-BAD-001' for 500.00 is uncollectible. Write off this bad debt by creating a new Expense account named 'Bad Debts' and issuing a credit note for 'Alfreds Futterkiste' dated today. Allocate the 500.00 amount to the 'Bad Debts' expense account using the description 'Write off uncollectible invoice'.
